title:
DevNet remains on Splice 0.5.4
TestNet remains on Splice 0.5.4
MainNet remains on Splice 0.5.4
Cut Splice release 0.5.5

January 10th - 11th: Round 78,840: Minting Curve halving. Reward shares shift from SVs to app providers

January 9th: High-priority multi-party test trades / workflows on TestNet

DevNet upgrades to Splice 0.5.5
TestNet remains on Splice 0.5.4
MainNet remains on Splice 0.5.4
Cut Splice release 0.5.6

DevNet SVs upgrade to Splice 0.5.6, DevNet Validators stay on 0.5.5
TestNet upgrades to Splice 0.5.5
MainNet remains on Splice 0.5.4
Cut Splice release 0.5.7

DevNet upgrades to Splice 0.5.7

TestNet SVs upgrade to Splice 0.5.6, TestNet Validators stay on 0.5.5

MainNet upgrades to Splice 0.5.5
DevNet SVs upgrade to Splice 0.5.8
DevNet Validators upgrade to Splice 0.5.8

Daml versions from 0.5.7 effective on DevNet (CIP-82 development fund accumulation).

Note: for this particular Daml model upgrade, Validator nodes on Splice 0.5.5 will continue to operate correctly after the new Daml models take effect. Upgrades to 0.5.8 are still recommended and will be required for future Daml model upgrades. Cut Splice release 0.5.9

DevNet upgrades to Splice 0.5.9.

TestNet upgrades to Splice 0.5.8 (skipping 0.5.7)

MainNet SVs upgrade to Splice 0.5.6, MainNet Validators stay on 0.5.5

Daml versions from 0.5.7 effective on TestNet (CIP-82 development fund accumulation)
Note: for this particular Daml model upgrade, Validator nodes on Splice 0.5.5 will continue to operate correctly after the new Daml models take effect. Upgrades to 0.5.8 are still recommended and will be required for future Daml model upgrades.
Cut Splice release 0.5.10

DevNet upgrades to Splice 0.5.10
TestNet upgrades to Splice 0.5.9
MainNet upgrades to Splice 0.5.8 (skipping 0.5.7)
Daml versions from 0.5.9 effective on DevNet (CIP-0073 and CIP-0096 support for Minting Delegation)

Daml versions from 0.5.7 effective on MainNet (CIP-82 development fund accumulation)
DevNet, TestNet and MainNet Validator Liveness rewards go from 3.33 per round to 2.5 per round

Cut Splice release 0.5.11
